choose-your-path: প্রাচীন বনের মধ্য দিয়ে আপনার পথ বেছে নিন
free-explore-desc-v2: Wander freely through a peaceful forest with day and night cycles, fireflies, butterflies, and a winding river. Plant seeds and return to watch your garden bloom.
story-mode-desc-v2: Follow the last Warden's trail through whispering woods, a shifting canopy, and a tranquil grove. Solve puzzles, uncover the journal, restore the forest.
